entries.title: Degree history
entries.body: I graduated with a degree in Business Administration, which has definitely helped me in my new role.

entries.title: Support group memory
entries.body: I went to a LGBTQ support group yesterday and it was so powerful.

entries.title: Boot care note
entries.body: I've been wearing my new boots almost daily since January 15th and I want to make sure they last long.
